title: Linear A inscription record (v1)
description: One Linear A inscription, normalized from SigLA. Tokenization rules: AB-numbered syllabograms emit bare ids ('AB01'); Linear-A-only signs keep the 'A' prefix ('A301'); logograms emit 'LOG:<id>'; fractions 'FRAC:<id>'; transaction signs are emitted as bare phonetic ids; word dividers as the literal token 'DIV'; unreadable signs as '[?]'; uncertain readings as '[?:<id>]'. Numerals are not represented (SigLA does not encode them as signs); when a corpus source that does is added, NUM:<value> tokens will be emitted.

id.description: SigLA inscription ID, e.g. 'HT 1' or 'KN Wc <24a>'.

period.description: Archaeological period as recorded by SigLA, e.g. 'LM IB'.

genre_hint.description: Heuristic genre label derived from kind + sign roles. Not authoritative.

transcription_confidence.description: clean: no erasures or unreadable signs. partial: some damaged signs. fragmentary: ≥30% damaged or no signs at all.

tokens.description: Ordered token sequence per the v1 tokenization rules.

raw_transliteration.description: Hyphen-joined word patterns separated by ' / '. Empty for inscriptions with no transcription.

source.description: Stable provenance pointer back to SigLA.

source_url.description: Resolvable URL of the inscription page on sigla.phis.me.

corpus_link.description: Cross-reference link to GORILA / EtCret edition where SigLA provides one.
